mapper.insert: insert into internship_reflection (student_id, student_name, student_user_id, content, remark, submit_time, ai_keywords, ai_analysis, ai_score, ai_analysis_time, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{studentUserId}, #{content}, #{remark}, #{submitTime}, #{aiKeywords}, #{aiAnalysis}, #{aiScore}, #{aiAnalysisTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.select: select ir.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_reflection ir left join student_users su on ir.student_id = su.id where ir.id = #{id}

select ir.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_reflection ir left join student_users su on ir.student_id = su.id where ir.student_id = #{studentId} and ir.deleted = 0 order by ir.submit_time desc

select ir.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_reflection ir left join student_users su on ir.student_id = su.id where ir.deleted = 0 order by ir.submit_time desc

select ir.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_reflection ir left join student_users su on ir.student_id = su.id where ir.status = #{status} and ir.deleted = 0 order by ir.submit_time desc

select ir.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_reflection ir left join student_users su on ir.student_id = su.id
ir.deleted = 0
AND ir.student_id = #{studentId}
AND ir.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%')
AND ir.student_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentUserId}, '%')
AND ir.status = #{status}
order by ir.submit_time desc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internship_reflection WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
